title: Clones and Souls
wikitext:
[]: Clones and Souls             Quote Post by kylethestrange » Sat Sep 04, 2010 11:37 am The Rei clones have no souls, but why? How to they stay together? Rei starts to literally fall apart in EOE, and I was under the impression that it has something to do with souls. That if you add a soul to LCL you get a person (basically). Is Rei made of Particle Wave Matter? I'm basing this on the wiki article on metaphysical biology.

[]: Re: Clones and Souls             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Sep 04, 2010 1:06 pm kylethestrange wrote: The Rei clones have no souls, but why?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 04, 2010 2:38 pm To add on to this, it seems to be a rule that artificial life aren't born with souls. This is why the Evangelions had to absorb souls from mothers and shit.

Rei starts to literally fall apart in EOE, and I was under the impression that it has something to do with souls. That if you add a soul to LCL you get a person (basically). Is Rei made of Particle Wave Matter? I'm basing this on the wiki article on metaphysical biology.
